content: September 2021 Learn how and when to remove this message The Bastard baronetcy , of Kitley in the County of Devon, was a title intended to be created in the Baronetage of Great Britain in September 1779 for William Bastard 1727 1782 in recognition of his actions in saving the arsenal of Plymouth from a French fleet in August of that year
